name: Cuckoo Returns
description: Eastern Style Cider using dessert fruit from our own & other nearby wildlife friendly orchards.

name: Discovery
description: Single variety refreshing cider with notes of strawberry.

name: Smokin' Barrels
description: Made with a blend of bittersweet cider apples & foraged desserts.

name: Pegasus
description: Complex copper-coloured beer. The initial hoppiness is balanced with a long fruity, malty finish. Very moreish.

name: Justinian
description: Crisp pale bronze-coloured bitter. Attractive bitter orange flavours persist into a satisfying lasting finish.

name: Orion
description: Crisp session bitter. Created in September 2023 using finest Maris Otter pale malt, Galena and Citra hops.

name: Nero
description: A satisfying, full-flavoured black brew with a good balance of malt, roast and fruit. Bittersweet flavours carry through to a dry finish.

name: Big Bad Wolf
description: Pale golden ale with piney notes and a citrusy aroma.

name: Easy
description: Easy drinking traditional amber.

name: Slap N' Tickle
description: A summer blonde with a big slap of bitterness and just a tickle of hops.

name: Cambridge Best Bitter
description: Copper coloured, English best bitter; the malt and hop aromas carry through to the taste and the finish is rounded with a growing hop bitterness.

name: Heavenly Matter
description: A crisp, clean, straw coloured light bodied beer. Citra hops are prominent throughout, with a huge hoppy citrus, tropical fruit aroma and taste which leads to a generous bitterness in the finish.

name: Guinness (Cans)
description: The iconic Irish dry stout

name: Guinness 0.0 (Cans)
description: All the taste, none of the alcohol

description: Italian sparkling wine

description: Alcohol free sparkling wine
